creator: takamune@avrl.mei.co.jp
text:
Please apply this patch to upgrade ports.

  - Updates japanese/ndtpd for the latest version ja-ndtpd-2.2.2.
  - Updates japanese/eb for the latest version ja-eb-2.2.2.
  - These are both bug fixed version from 2.2, and should be
    simultaneously upgraded.
  - No files have been added.
  - I've changed MAINTAINER to myself with the agreement of previous maintainer.
